name: SurveySparrow
description:
Survey Sparrow's Review Management Tool is a breeze to use and helps businesses stay on top of customer feedback effortlessly. With its easy-to-understand features, you can keep track of reviews from different platforms, reply to feedback quickly, and see how customers feel about your business. Plus, it gives you insights and reports to help you understand trends over time. 

Source: SurveySparrow.com

Features:

➡️Helps you monitor reviews

➡️Helps eliminate unresponsive communication through tailored workflows

➡️Get in-depth reporting analytics and insights

Benefits:

✅SurveySparrow is cheaper than Birdeye

✅Helps you create tickets for every review you receive and assign them to the right people

✅Offers a comprehensive customer management solution through their surveys 

✅Tracks customer sentiment and provides tailored responses

Cons

❌One cannot request reviews from their customers because the feature is still under development

❌Not very cost-effective
‍

The starting price at 7.17$ Per Month
what_people_say:
Likes:

“User-Friendly Interface: The interface is very intuitive which makes it easy to use to create surveys. Moreover, we got positive feedback from respondents.

Conversational Surveys: Our respondent pointed out the conversational interface which made the NPS survey stand out.

Multi-Channel Distribution: We were able to distribute our NPS surveys via mail and embedded links which was very useful.”

‍

Dislikes:

“Limited Free Plan:

The free plan is quite limited in terms of advanced features and response numbers.

Learning Curve for Advanced Features:

The advanced features that are available are quite complex and additional tutorials would be helpful.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
